info.title: SharpAPI
info.description: Real-time sports betting odds API with +EV detection, arbitrage alerts, and Pinnacle sharp book reference. Build automated betting tools and receive instant opportunity notifications.

tags.name: Markets
tags.description: Market types and specific market data

tags.name: Opportunities
tags.description: EV, arbitrage, and value bet detection

get.description: Returns list of available sports with event counts and associated leagues.
Returns list of leagues with event counts, optionally filtered by sport.
Returns list of events with filtering and pagination.
Returns only in-play live events.
Returns detailed information about a specific event including all available odds.
Search for events by team name.
Returns current odds from all sportsbooks.
Returns best available odds for each selection across all sportsbooks. Requires Pro tier.

parameters.name: event_ids
parameters.description: Comma-separated event IDs (batch lookup, max 10 for Pro, 50 for Sharp)

get.description: Returns +EV betting opportunities calculated against Pinnacle sharp line. Requires Pro tier.
Returns cross-book arbitrage opportunities with stake calculations. Requires Hobby tier or higher.
Returns enhanced EV opportunities with confidence ratings and combined value scores. Requires Pro tier.
Detects middle opportunities where both sides of a spread or total market could win, landing on numbers between the two lines. Requires Pro tier.

parameters.name: max_odds_age
parameters.description: Maximum age of odds in seconds. Filters out stale lines.

parameters.name: live
parameters.description: Filter by live (true) or prematch (false) events. Omit for both.

parameters.name: state
parameters.description: US state abbreviation for sportsbook deep links (e.g. "pa", "nj")

get.description: Returns aggregate statistics about currently available middle opportunities, broken down by sport, market type, and sportsbook. Requires Pro tier.
Returns a single middle opportunity by its unique identifier. Requires Pro tier.
Returns list of available market types with descriptions.
Returns player proposition markets. Requires Pro tier.
Returns alternate spread and total lines. Requires Pro tier.
Returns summary of all active markets with counts. Requires Pro tier.
Returns list of available sportsbooks with status and capabilities.
Returns API usage statistics and tier limits for the authenticated user.
Server-Sent Events stream of real-time odds, +EV, and arbitrage updates.

ApiKeyQuery.name: api_key
ApiKeyQuery.description: API key in query parameter (for SSE streams)

MiddleSideOdds.description: Odds data for one side of a middle opportunity

MiddleSide.description: One side of a middle opportunity

stake_percent.description: Recommended stake percentage for this side (0-100)

odds_age_seconds.description: How old these odds are in seconds, or null if unknown

deep_link.description: Direct link to this bet on the sportsbook, or null if unavailable

GameState.description: Current game state for live events

event_name.description: Display name of the event (e.g. "Lakers vs Celtics")

start_time.description: Event start time in ISO 8601 format, or null if unknown

middle_size.description: Size of the middle gap in points

middle_numbers.description: Integer values that fall within the middle

middle_probability.description: Estimated probability of landing in the middle (0-1)

expected_value.description: Expected value of the middle play as a decimal

worst_case_loss.description: Maximum loss if the middle does not hit

best_case_profit.description: Maximum profit if the middle hits

break_even_percent.description: Win percentage needed to break even

is_guaranteed_profit.description: Whether this middle guarantees profit regardless of outcome

guaranteed_roi.description: Guaranteed ROI percentage if is_guaranteed_profit is true, otherwise null

key_numbers.description: Key numbers (high-frequency landing numbers) within the middle

key_number_probability.description: Combined probability of landing on key numbers (0-1)

quality_score.description: Overall quality score from 0-100 combining EV, probability, and key numbers

market_overround.description: Combined overround (vig) of the two sides

odds_age_seconds.description: Age of the oldest odds in this opportunity in seconds

is_live.description: Whether the event is currently live

game_state.description: Current game state for live events, null for prematch

is_player_prop.description: Whether this is a player prop market

player_name.description: Player name if is_player_prop is true

stat_category.description: Stat category if is_player_prop is true (e.g. "points", "rebounds")

is_team_total.description: Whether this is a team total market

team_name.description: Team name if is_team_total is true

warnings.description: Warning messages about this opportunity (e.g. stale odds, low liquidity)

detected_at.description: When this opportunity was first detected (ISO 8601)

count.description: Number of results in this page

filters.description: Active filters applied to the request

remaining.description: API calls remaining in current window

reset_at.description: When the rate limit window resets

MiddlesSummaryResponse.description: Aggregate statistics about available middle opportunities

positive_ev_count.description: Number of opportunities with positive expected value

best_ev.description: Best EV opportunity summary, or null if no opportunities

has_key_numbers_count.description: Number of opportunities containing key numbers

updated_at.description: When the summary was last computed
